sentences.arabic_text: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ
sentences.english: I bear witness that there is no god but Allah

sentences.arabic_text: شَهِدَ اللَّهُ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ
sentences.english: Allah bears witness that there is no god but He

sentences.arabic_text: قُلْ أَيُّ شَيْءٍ أَكْبَرُ شَهَادَةً ۖ قُلِ اللَّهُ شَهِيدٌ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَكُمْ
sentences.english: Say: What is greatest as testimony? Say: Allah is Witness between me and you

sentences.arabic_text: وَكُنتُ عَلَيْهِمْ شَهِيدًا مَّا دُمْتُ فِيهِمْ
sentences.english: And I was a witness over them while I was among them
Whoever witnesses the month (of Ramadan) should fast it

sentences.arabic_text: رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا بِمَا أَنزَلْتَ وَاتَّبَعْنَا الرَّسُولَ فَاكْتُبْنَا مَعَ الشَّاهِدِينَ
sentences.english: Our Lord, we believe in what You have sent down and followed the Messenger — so write us among the witnesses

sentences.arabic_text: إِذَا جَاءَكَ الْمُنَافِقُونَ قَالُوا نَشْهَدُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُ اللَّهِ وَاللَّهُ يَشْهَدُ إِنَّ الْمُنَافِقِينَ لَكَاذِبُونَ
sentences.english: The hypocrites say: we testify you are Allah's Messenger. But Allah testifies that the hypocrites are liars

sentences.arabic_text: شَهِدَ عَلَيْهِمْ سَمْعُهُمْ وَأَبْصَارُهُمْ وَجُلُودُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ
sentences.english: Their hearing, their sight, and their skins testified against them for what they used to do

sentences.arabic_text: قَالَ فَاشْهَدُوا وَأَنَا مَعَكُم مِّنَ الشَّاهِدِينَ
sentences.english: He said: Then bear witness, and I am with you among the witnesses

sentences.arabic_text: مَعَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ النَّبِيِّينَ وَالصِّدِّيقِينَ وَالشُّهَدَاءِ وَالصَّالِحِينَ
sentences.english: With those Allah has blessed — the prophets, the truthful, the witnesses, and the righteous

sentences.arabic_text: قُلِ اللَّهُمَّ فَاطِرَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ عَالِمَ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ
sentences.english: Say: O Allah, Creator of the heavens and earth, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed

sentences.arabic_text: أَجَعَلَ الآلِهَةَ إِلَٰهًا وَاحِدًا إِنَّ هَذَا لَشَيْءٌ عُجَابٌ
sentences.english: Has he made all the gods into one God?! This is astonishing!

sentences.arabic_text: لَخَلْقُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ أَكْبَرُ مِنْ خَلْقِ النَّاسِ
sentences.english: The creation of the heavens and earth is greater than the creation of mankind
Every small and great thing is recorded

sentences.arabic_text: إِنَّنِي أَنَا اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنَا فَاعْبُدْنِي وَأَقِمِ الصَّلَاةَ لِذِكْرِي
sentences.english: Indeed I am Allah — there is no god but Me, so worship Me and establish prayer for My remembrance
